c.d: Clean, intuitive interface enhances the listening experience.
Advanced search and personalized recommendations help you find new content.
Features like speed adjustment, offline listening, and sleep timers provide flexibility.
Syncing across devices and integration with other services (like smart speakers) makes for a seamless experience.
Availability on multiple operating systems (iOS, Android, Web).
Ability to download episodes for offline listening.
Availability of a subscription or version without advertisements.
Offers exclusive podcasts or early access to episodes.
Includes smart speed, voice boost, or other audio enhancement features.
Supports podcasting 2.0 features like transcriptions from RSS feeds or commenting on episodes.
